meta.title: Kaspersky Tools & Info For The ICS Security Community
meta.description: Anton Shipulin and Vladimir Dashchenko of Kaspersky take 20 minutes to go over all the contributions Kaspersky is making to educate and help the ICS security community. It's an impressive list.
